Video.summary: Boris Karloff's portrayal of monsters and villains made him the undisputed king of 20th century horror.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Celebrate Lon Chaney Jr.’s big screen legacy of classic creatures and complex misfits.
Video.grandparentTitle: Monsters & Misfits: The Legacy of Lon Chaney Jr.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From monster mashups and horror hijinks, Bela Lugosi was much more than cinema’s greatest vampire.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From 'Haunted Hill' to Corman classics, Vincent Price sent shivers down the spines of horror fans for decades.
Video.grandparentTitle: Vincent Price: Master of the Silver Scream
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From sharp satire to offbeat stories, these Westerns put a fresh spin on Hollywood's wildest frontier.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Two masters of horror bring your nightmares to the big screen in this spine-chilling collection.
Video.grandparentTitle: Terror Titans: The Films of Wes Craven and John Carpenter
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: A legend in the exploitation genre, these are the films that define director Jack Hill's career.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: TFH creator Joe Dante celebrates the noir classics that explore themes of identity, paranoia, and duality.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Director Eli Roth presents a wild ride through cult horror, shocking exploitation, and vintage sci-fi.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: In space, only the people sitting next to you can hear you scream. So scream loud!
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: In these sci-fi classics, no one is quite who they seem, and the threat of invasion is closer than you think.
Video.grandparentTitle: Impostor Syndrome: The Best of Big Screen Body Snatchers
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From “Nosferatu” to “Dracula,” everyone loves blood-sucking Vampires!
Video.title: Viva La Vampire!!

Video.summary: Passengers aboard a Trans-Siberian Express train must fight to stay alive after a prehistoric creature escapes captivity and begins a murder spree.
Video.title: Horror Express

Video.summary: Journey back to the 1950s and 60s, where science and imagination brought forth a new wave of classic films.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Monsters, aliens, mutants, and more! Who will save us from cinema's most terrifying atomic-era creatures?
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: It's a wild blast from the past, as atomic monsters, aliens, and more invade your living room!
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From the depths of space (and deeper), comes an all-new collection of intergalactic invaders and futuristic fears!
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: A gripping collection of noir classics, where crime, corruption, and fate collide on the big screen.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hardboiled & Haunted: The Art of Noir Cinema
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From Hammer hits to Corman classics and more, these movies made Christopher Lee a horror icon.
Video.grandparentTitle: Christopher Lee: From Fangs to Frights
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From Norman Bates to Michael Myers and more, these killers love carving up the screen.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Your favorite filmmakers take you inside Britain's iconic Hammer Film factory.
Video.title: Hammered Horror Vol. 1

Video.summary: Take a journey into the heart of Hammer horror with today's top filmmakers.
Video.title: Hammered Horror Vol. 2

Video.summary: A gunman (Jack Palance) makes a fatal mistake when he and his gang ravage a town and murder the local priest (Lee Van Cleef). Now, the priest’s twin brother vows revenge, and teams with a local boy (Leif Garrett) to bring the gunman and his gang to their knees. Lee Van Cleef played dual roles in this 1977 Spaghetti Western produced by Golan-Globus Productions.
Video.title: God's Gun

Video.summary: The legendary Count Dracula inspires a bevy of onscreen bloodsuckers!
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From the tombs of Egypt to the Paris Opera House, the monsters are on the loose!
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From Carrie to Eraserhead and beyond, Stephen King and David Lynch have defined cinematic storytelling for decades.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stephen King Stories and Decoding David Lynch
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jack Nicholson's career is defined by charismatic charm, brilliant madness, and iconic performances across decades.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The infamous outlaw Jesse James crosses paths with Dr. Frankenstein's murderous granddaughter, Maria.
Video.title: Jesse James Meets Frankensteins Daughter

Video.summary: In director F.W. Murnau’s unauthorized adaptation of Bram Stoker’s 1897 novel Dracula, vampire Count Orlock (Max Schreck) leaves Transylvania in search of a young woman, Ellen Hutter (Greta Schroder), while evading her husband, Thomas (Gustav von Wangenheim), and the Van Helsing-esque Professor Bulwer (Gustav Botz). A monumental achievement in German Expressionism, Nosferatu is revered as one of the most influential horror films of all time.
Video.title: Nosferatu

Video.summary: When corpses are discovered with blood drained from their bodies, residents of a European village suspect it to be the work of a vampire. Meanwhile, a skeptical police inspector (Melvyn Douglas) is determined to uncover the truth.
Video.title: The Vampire Bat

Video.summary: Bela Lugosi should have known better than to use his experimental ape man formula on himself. Now things are getting really hairy.
Video.title: The Ape Man

Video.summary: Universal Horror Volume 1
Video.title: Universal Horror Volume 1

Video.summary: While “The Raven” may fly high, others less fortunate are subject to a “Premature Burial” inside “The Tomb of Ligeia”
Video.title: Corman, Price and Poe

Video.summary: John Landis returns to Trailers from Hell to talk 'Citizen Kane' and more classic movies.
Video.title: The Land of Landis: Golden Age Gone Wild

Image.alt: The Land of Landis: Golden Age Gone Wild
The Land of Landis: Golden Age Gone Wild
The Land of Landis: Golden Age Gone Wild

Video.summary: Director John Landis joins Trailers from Hell to talk 'Battle for the Planet of the Apes' and more.
Video.title: The Land of Landis: Apes, Angels, and Anarchy

Image.alt: The Land of Landis: Apes, Angels, and Anarchy
The Land of Landis: Apes, Angels, and Anarchy
The Land of Landis: Apes, Angels, and Anarchy
